name: BetterCloud SaaS Management Platform API
what_it_does: SaaS management and security platform with API — automating IT operations for SaaS apps including user lifecycle management, access reviews, security policy enforcement, data protection, and workflow automation across Google Workspace, Slack, Salesforce, and 90+ SaaS integrations.
use_cases: Automating user onboarding and offboarding workflows across multiple SaaS applications
Enforcing SaaS security policies (MFA, file sharing) across connected applications via API
Running access reviews and permission audits across SaaS app portfolio
Triggering BetterCloud workflows from HRIS events (hire/depart) via webhook integration
Querying SaaS user activity and policy violation data for security reporting
not_for: SaaS spend management and contract negotiation (use Vendr or Zluri for procurement)
Cloud IaaS cost optimization (use Vantage or Cloudability)
Identity provider replacement (use Okta or Azure AD as primary IdP)
best_when: An IT or security team managing 50+ SaaS applications needs to automate user lifecycle across all tools and enforce security policies — especially for Google Workspace-heavy organizations.
avoid_when: You have fewer than 20 SaaS applications, primarily need spend management (not IT automation), or your identity management is handled entirely by your IdP.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with role-based access. Webhook for workflow events and policy violations. Google Workspace OAuth for GW management. Okta and Azure AD integration for identity source. Scoped access by resource type (users, policies, workflows). SSO via SAML for platform access.

pricing.notes: New York-based company. Founded 2013. Raised $187M total (Series E). Backed by Vista Equity Partners, Warburg Pincus. Pioneer in SaaS Management Platform (SMP) category. Google Workspace depth is strongest differentiator — deep GW API integrations. Workflow automation engine (Workflows) for no-code IT automation. 3,500+ enterprise customers. Forrester Wave leader in SaaS Management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; enterprise rate limits available

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for users, policies, workflows, and audit logs. OAuth2 auth. Good enterprise documentation. Deep Google Workspace integration requires GW OAuth scopes. Workflow triggers via webhook. User lifecycle automation via API + Workflows engine. SaaS app connections configured in BetterCloud dashboard.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User reads fully idempotent. Policy reads idempotent. Workflow triggers not idempotent — use workflow run ID for deduplication.
known_agent_gotchas: Google Workspace OAuth required for GW management — separate from BetterCloud OAuth
Workflow triggers via webhooks — BetterCloud Workflows not directly API-triggerable in all cases
Annual contract required — validate ROI before committing to implementation
SaaS app connections require OAuth for each connected app — multiple auth setups
Vista Equity-backed — pricing has increased; validate current pricing before procurement

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA compliant. US and EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Manages sensitive user access data — strong audit logging required. HIPAA BAA available for healthcare organizations. Security policy enforcement across SaaS — platform itself is a high-value target requiring strong access controls.
